title: Web design and development
long_description: Web design and development involves creating functional, visually appealing websites. Web design focuses on the layout, aesthetics, and user experience, while development handles the technical aspects—front-end (client-side) coding for interactivity and back-end (server-side) logic for data and functionality. Together, they ensure seamless user interaction and efficient website performance. Front-end developers use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, while back-end developers work with servers, databases, and APIs.
